component.name: Folio
component.summary: Gestiona tu biblioteca personal de libros electrónicos

description.p: Folio is a GTK4 desktop application for managing your collection of EPUB ebooks. It keeps track of what you have, what you've read, what's waiting in your queue, and how the books move between your e-reader devices.

ul.li: Import an existing folder of EPUBs in one click
Browse a clean grid of covers, sorted and searchable
Track what you're reading, want to read, and have finished
Multiple user profiles, each with an independent reading log
Add books read on paper or other apps as external entries
Edit book metadata and embed covers back into the EPUB
Send books to your e-reader by cable, WiFi, or SFTP
KoReader integration: read your statistics directly from the device
Annual reading goal with progress bar and monthly chart
Discover suggestions: series continuations, more from favourite authors
Export your reading log to CSV or Markdown

description.p: Folio es una aplicación GTK4 para gestionar tu colección de libros EPUB. Lleva el registro de lo que tienes, lo que has leído, lo que tienes pendiente y cómo viajan los libros entre tus lectores.

screenshot.caption: The main library grid
La cuadrícula principal de la biblioteca
Reading log with annual goal
Registro de lecturas con meta anual
Stats: monthly chart, KPIs and top authors
Estadísticas: gráfico mensual, KPIs y autores favoritos

ul.li: Import a folder of EPUBs and browse them in a cover grid
Reading log: tracking what you've read, are reading, or plan to read
Stats page with annual goal and monthly chart
Device management: send books by cable, WiFi or SFTP
KoReader stats: streak, reading speed, best hour
